top_signals.title: 2026-007: Critical Vulnerability in Windows Netlogon
top_signals.summary: On 12 May 2026, Microsoft published a security advisory addressing a critical vulnerability affecting Windows Server when acting as a domain controller. This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code over a network. According…

top_signals.title: 2026-006: Critical Vulnerability in PAN-OS
top_signals.summary: On 6 May 2026, Palo Alto published a security advisory addressing a critical vulnerability affecting PAN-OS. This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges. Palo Alto observed limited exploitation of this…

top_signals.title: 2026-008: Critical vulnerabilities in Ivanti Sentry
top_signals.summary: On 9 June 2026, Ivanti released a security advisory addressing two critical vulnerabilities in their Sentry products[1]. An attacker could exploit those flaws to achieve unauthenticated remote code execution on the vulnerable device.

top_signals.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

top_signals.title: 2026-005: High Vulnerability in the Linux Kernel ("Copy Fail")
top_signals.summary: On 29 April 2026, a high local privilege escalation vulnerability in the Linux kernel, tracked as CVE-2026-31431 and named "Copy Fail", was publicly disclosed. The vulnerability affects every mainstream Linux distributions shipping a kernel built since 2017.…

top_signals.title: Vulnérabilité dans Apache Struts 2 (13 décembre 2023)
